topic: EMDR and trauma — what the brain actually does
caption: Did you know EMDR can rewire your brain? 🧠💡 EMDR (Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing) is a powerful therapy for trauma. Research shows it can reduce symptoms of PTSD by 50% 📉. It works by mimicking REM sleep, processing traumatic memories 🌃. Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you 🙏💖 #EMDR #TraumaRecovery #MentalHealthMatters #BrainHealth #PTSDAwareness #TherapyWorks #HealingJourney #MentalHealthSupport
